allow: Bash(git commit -m 'fix: revert to sonnet model, show answer sheet in share view *)

Bash(git commit -m 'docs: add CONTEXT.md — full project context for new Claude/Cursor sessions *)

Bash(git commit -m 'fix: remove web portal build from CI \(Vercel handles it\), keep backend tests only *)

Bash(sed -i 's|for Claude \(1200px wide|for AI upload \(1200px wide|g' mobile/src/lib/pdf.ts)
